overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban plaza at night, eventually sitting down at an outdoor table to smoke. The scene features heavy rainfall, futuristic architecture, and cyberpunk aesthetics with vibrant neon signage and wet reflective surfaces.

events.description: begins walking forward along the wet pathway away from the seated officer

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked elevated walkway, moving away from the seated officer toward the city skyline

notable_agents.action: security officer sitting on a bench looking at a handheld device

entered.detail: seated officer in blue uniform with weapon visible
yellow vertical safety railings along the walkway edge
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signs
rain-soaked tiled ground reflecting neon lights
bright white spotlights illuminating the walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night in a futuristic city, with the player standing near a seated security officer on an elevated walkway. The camera moves forward along the wet pavement, passing yellow safety railings as the city skyline with its neon-lit towers stretches ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with food vendor

events.description: walkway opens into a larger plaza area with a neon-lit food stall visible ahead
passing by a food vendor stall emitting bright green neon light

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the food vendor area, navigating around scattered debris on the wet ground

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking near the food vendor stall

entered.detail: food stall with bright green neon lighting and serving counter
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the plaza
tall street lights illuminating the open plaza area
trash and discarded objects littering the wet ground surface

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens into a wide urban plaza where a food vendor stall with distinctive green neon lighting comes into view on the left. The player continues walking through the rain, passing scattered debris and street lamps, with an elevated pedestrian bridge visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area with vending machines

events.description: enters a covered seating area with round tables and illuminated vending machines
approaches a table where an NPC wearing a wide-brimmed hat is standing

agents.ego_description: walking through the seating area toward a specific table, passing rows of vending machines with bright screens on the right

notable_agents.action: character in a wide-brimmed hat and coat standing by a round table

entered.detail: row of bright vending machines with illuminated product displays and advertisements
circular tables with glowing purple neon stems
overhead structure providing partial shelter from the rain
large digital billboards displaying animated content above the vending machines

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered seating area featuring round tables with glowing purple stems and a row of brightly lit vending machines. Walking under the building overhang, the player approaches a table where an NPC in a distinctive hat stands waiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating at vending machine plaza

events.description: player character sits down at the round table
NPC in hat stands up and walks away from the table
player character takes out a cigarette and begins smoking

agents.ego_description: sits down at the table, takes out a cigarette and smokes while observing the rainy plaza environment

notable_agents.action: character in hat stands up and walks away from the table

segments.scene_description: The player sits down at the table as the NPC in the hat departs. Now alone at the table, the player lights a cigarette and smokes while the rain continues to fall around the sheltered seating area, with the glow of vending machines visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city, moving from an open elevated walkway into a sheltered urban seating area. It begins by gliding along wet pavement past a seated security officer and yellow safety railings, with neon-lit towers looming in the distance. As the walkway expands into a wide plaza, the camera passes a green-lit food stall and scattered debris under the shadow of an overhead pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts into a semi-covered area characterized by glowing purple tables and bright vending machines, where the camera approaches an NPC in a distinctive hat. Finally, the movement settles as the player sits at a table and lights a cigarette, remaining sheltered from the falling rain while the neon glow of the machines lingers in the background.
